AN EF0 TORNADO TOUCHED DOWN INITIALLY 5 MILE WEST OF FARMERSBURG AT 534 PM CDT AND DISSIPATED 2 MILES SOUTHWEST OF MONONA AT 541 PM CDT. PATH LENGTH WAS 4.3 MILES. PATH WIDTH WAS 40 YARDS. DAMAGE MAINLY TO CROPS AND TREES. NARROW PATH TRACKED THROUGH CORN FIELDS. SOME OUTBUILDINGS WERE DAMAGED AND ONE HOUSE HAD BRANCHES IMPALED THROUGH SIDE WALLS. METAL FENCING POSTS BENT JUST BEFORE TORNADO DISSIPATED. NO INJURIES OR DEATHS.
